title: RuntimeProfile
description: A RuntimeProfile (capability/synced, Phase 24): a named 'where intelligence runs' target. SECURITY INVARIANT (load-bearing): the API key is NEVER a wire field — additionalProperties:false makes any key-shaped field a validation failure. The key lives in each surface's custodian (iPad Keychain / hub HOLDSPEAK_PROFILE_<id>_KEY) and is joined at request time. Canonical hub emission: ProfileRecord.to_dict().
